description_long: This is a full-size, slim-profile keyboard with a matte black finish, featuring a standard QWERTY key layout and an integrated numeric keypad on the right. The keys are low-profile and evenly spaced, with a flat, rectangular chassis that appears to be constructed primarily from plastic. The surface is smooth and uniform, with no visible branding or decorative elements. The keyboard's design is minimalist, with all keys clearly labeled in white, providing high contrast against the dark background. There are no visible cables or wireless receivers attached, suggesting a clean and uncluttered appearance. The overall build appears sturdy and modern, suitable for both office and public urban environments.
description: A slim, matte black full-size keyboard with a standard QWERTY layout and numeric keypad, featuring low-profile keys and a minimalist design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the keyboard's slim profile and flat, rectangular shape.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the full key layout, including the numeric keypad and low-profile keys.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the even spacing of the keys.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the key arrangement and the overall width of the keyboard.
